query: Apple fiscal 2024 revenue $391 billion Microsoft fiscal 2024 revenue $245 billion
answer: Apple's fiscal 2024 revenue was $391 billion. Microsoft's fiscal 2024 revenue was $245 billion.

results.title: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion - The Business Standard
results.snippet: Microsoft revenue hits $245 billion. ## By The Numbers. ## Microsoft reports $245 billion revenue for Fiscal Year ended June 30, 2024, a 16% increase, driven by strong performance in cloud services and other key sectors. Microsoft revenue reached $245 billion in 2024, showing strong growth. Image of Microsoft headquarters with revenue increase graphic. Microsoft's revenue hits $245B in 2024! Microsoft's revenue climbed to $245 billion in 2024, up from $212 billion the previous year, which represents a 16% increase. As the world's second-largest company by market cap, the company reported net income of $88.1 billion in 2024, posting an impressive 22% annual increase. Microsoft's 2024 revenue breakdown showing Azure as the top earner, followed by Office, Windows, Gaming (Xbox), and LinkedIn. Revenue percentages shown. Azure leads Microsoft's revenue in 2024 | Illustration: Ashrafun naher Ananna. #### Top News. By the numbers / Microsoft / revenue. Published comments are readers’ own views and The Business Standard does not endorse any of the readers’ comments.

results.title: Apple's Revenue Hits $391 Billion, Net Income $94 Billion in Year ...
results.snippet: # Apple’s Revenue Hits $391 Billion, Net Income $94 Billion in Year Ending Q3 2024. For the year ending in Q3 2024, Apple’s revenue reached $391.0 billion, marking a 2.0% year-over-year increase, while net income declined by 3.4% to $93.7 billion. Since 1995, Apple has achieved a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.1% in revenue and 20.5% in net income, underscoring its robust long-term growth trajectory. ## Recent Posts. results.title: Apple's Revenue Hits $396 Billion, Net Income $96 Billion in 2024
results.snippet: # 📈 Apple’s Revenue Hits $396 Billion, Net Income $96 Billion in 2024. 📈 Apple’s Revenue Hits $396 Billion, Net Income $96 Billion in 2024. Apple’s Revenue Rises to $396 Billion in 2024, While Net Income Declines. In 2024, Apple’s revenue grew to $395.8 billion, a 2.6% increase year-over-year, while net income fell 4.7% to $96.2 billion. Since 2000, Apple has maintained a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 18.6% in revenue and 25.6% in net income. However, both revenue and net income have largely plateaued around $387 billion and $98 billion since 2021. ##### Where Data Tells the Story. ###### Home. ###### Support. ###### Creators. ###### Legal. 📈 Apple’s Revenue Hits $396 Billion, Net Income $96 Billion in 2024 - Voronoi.
